description.value: **Benefit:** Choose one 1st-level spell from the bard, cleric, druid, or sorcerer/wizard spell list. If you have the Brew Potion feat, you may create potions of this spell as if it were on your spell list. Editor’s Note There is a newer Trait with this same name, from a similarly desert-themed source book, which is likely meant to replace this one. However, they work quite a bit differently. Consult your GM to determine which he or she prefers for their campaign setting.
